task_completion.description: Agent writes or executes Python code utilizing the ZMQ Remote API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, Python shell, or text editor showing Python code that appends or uses the path '/opt/CoppeliaSim/programming/zmqRemoteApi/clients/python/src' and imports the remote API client to interact with CoppeliaSim.

task_completion.description: The pick-and-place demo scene is loaded into CoppeliaSim.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim GUI displays the 'pickAndPlaceDemo.ttt' scene, which typically includes a robotic arm, a conveyor belt, and blocks, rather than an empty scene.

task_completion.description: The simulation is started and actively running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Play' button in the CoppeliaSim toolbar is visibly toggled on/pressed, and the simulation state indicates it is running.

task_completion.description: The simulation has been running for at least 5 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The simulation time indicator in the CoppeliaSim GUI displays a value of 5.00 seconds or greater.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the running simulation is saved to the specified export path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal (e.g., using 'ls'), file manager, or image viewer showing the file 'simulation_running.png' successfully created in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ZMQ Remote API to load the scene and start the simulation, rather than manually clicking through the CoppeliaSim GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for executed Python scripts or terminal commands performing the load and run actions. The agent should not be seen using 'File -> Open scene' or manually clicking the 'Play' button in the CoppeliaSim GUI.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine image file and not a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'simulation_running.png' should have a non-zero file size in the terminal, or be visibly opened in an image viewer displaying the actual CoppeliaSim interface.

integrity.description: The simulation time was genuinely reached by running the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation time in the CoppeliaSim UI should naturally progress to >5.00s without evidence of the agent editing text overlays or altering the UI to fake the timestamp.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The pick-and-place demo scene is located at /opt/CoppeliaSim/scenes/pickAndPlaceDemo.ttt. The ZMQ Remote API Python client is located at /opt/CoppeliaSim/programming/zmqRemoteApi/clients/python/src. The final screenshot must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/simulation_running.png.
